FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Initial version
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Initial version. Mod already in alpha.

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Minor update
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Minor update to account for a class rename in the main Empire Refactored mod.

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Events backend change
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Update to handle Empire Refactored's new events API.

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Base mod API update
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Update to handle new changes to the base mod.

patchNoteLines.li: Update to handle changes in the base mod.

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Events Edit Pass
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: An edit and tweak pass on all events. Some were culled, a couple chains were expanded.

patchNoteLines.li: Numerous changes to events across the board.

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Event Balance Pass
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Balances several of the event costs and modifiers to mitigate trap options and require actual silver investment for serious gains.

patchNoteLines.li: Edited many option costs and event modifiers

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Empire Naming Update
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Update the text of many of the events to use the player's faction's name and title more, instead of generic terms like "your empire".

patchNoteLines.li: Update event text to use the player's faction's name and title more

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Last Stretch Updates
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Handful of minor updates ahead of this week's release.

patchNoteLines.li: Removed the 'reroute power' option from the Power Grid Failure event
Add a no-cost option to the Master Weaponsmith event so that a player can't be softlocked by having no silver
Change the Cybernetic Enhancement event to be Spacer-level, and to affect the whole Empire
Added meme-gated options to several events
